option_line: bffi_jaspisAsk1:"I'm working with Novice Bornanew. For his penance, the matter of a false relic..."
original: I'm working with Novice Bornanew. For his penance, the matter of a false relic...

She holds up a hand to stop you from speaking further.

"My trust, and my prayers, are with Jethro. He will do what need be done, and if he trusts you, then I pray that you honor him."
"Alors, qu'en dites-vous ? Vous voulez toujours vous engager ?"
